metadata.description: Personal Claude Code skill collection — domain-organized monorepo by donggu

plugins.name: donggu-obsidian
plugins.description: Obsidian PKM vault operations — health audits, journal-to-CORE extraction rituals, duplicate detection. For LYT / PARA / Zettelkasten vaults.

plugins.name: donggu-docs
plugins.description: Document & deck authoring — zero-dependency animation-rich single-HTML slide decks for lectures, seminars, workshops, and launch talks. Style driven by a designs/ DESIGN.md library or visual discovery.

plugins.name: donggu-sns
plugins.description: SNS content authoring — Blog master + LinkedIn/Threads/X/Instagram/YouTube variants with Socratic retrieve from Obsidian vault, plus publish-sns (publish/delete with HITL gate + ledger) and make-insta-card-news (DESIGN.md-driven card images, Pexels/Commons sourcing + headless api render path). Preserves 회고형 1인칭 voice.

plugins.name: donggu-media
plugins.description: YouTube transcript fetch — grabs ONLY a video's 자막/스크립트 text (~tens of KB over HTTP; never downloads the video or audio). get-youtube-scripts = transcript text; make-source = Obsidian reference note (summary + jump-timestamps). Captions-only.
